# Legacy: Richmond Finance Live Vehicle Tracker (SkyGuard)

Archived 2026-05-12.

This was the previous content of this repository — a single-page static
vehicle-tracker for four Richmond Finance fleet vehicles. It was hosted on
Vercel as a static site (see the original `vercel.json`).

It is preserved per the platform brief's soft-delete rule. The repository now
hosts the **Employee Payroll Loan Portal** (`apps/web`, `apps/mobile`, plus
shared packages); see the top-level `README.md`.

**Do not edit anything in this folder.** If you need the old tracker, copy it
out to a new repository.
